name: Kala soocida SALT (Nooc, Qiimee, Waxqabadyada Badbaadinta Nolosha, Daaweynta/Gaadiidka)
description: Nidaamka kala soocidda khasaaraha tirada badan. Halbeegga dhacdooyinka khasaaraha badan ee ciidamada iyo goobaha rayidka.
instructions: Talaabada 1: Kala soocida caalamka (socod, gacan haadin, weli). Tallaabada 2: Ku qiimee siday u kala horreeyaan. Talaabada 3: Samee waxqabadyo nafo-badbaadin ah (xakameyn dhiigbaxa weyn, marin hawo furan, irbad depression, auto-injectors). Tallaabada 4: U qoondee qaybta.

categories.label: Marxuumka la filayo
categories.description: Uma badna in lagu noolaado agab la heli karo, ama la xaqiijiyay inuu dhintay

categories.label: Degdeg ah (T1)
categories.description: Dhaawacyada naf-gooyada ah, waxay ku badbaadi doonaan faragelin degdeg ah

categories.label: Dib udhacday (T2)
categories.description: Dhaawacyo halis ah laakiin deggan, waxay sugi karaan daryeelka

categories.label: La filayo
categories.description: Dhaawac aan la badbaadin karin oo la siiyay agabka hadda jira -- daryeelka raaxada kaliya

pediatric.note: JumpSTART kala soocidda algorithm waxay wax ka beddeshaa SALT ee bukaannada carruurta. Heerarka heerka neefsiga iyo tillaabooyinka qiimayntu way ku kala duwan yihiin carruurta ka yar 8.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
